product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for military applications, motorcyclists clothing. Also special solutions where need high rubbing resistance.

descriptions: ArDura 1000 is 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military equipments.
It is EN ISO EN343 certified for waterproof
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability and water resistance.

technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3500N; Weft>3000N | EN ISO 13934-1

Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
